name: Dinomorphia Diplos
name_jp: ダイノルフィア・ディプロス
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can send 1 "Dinomorphia" card from your Deck to the GY, then if your LP are 2000 or less, inflict 500 damage to your opponent. If this card is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can banish 1 Trap from your GY; Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "Dinomorphia" monster from your GY, except "Dinomorphia Diplos". You can only use each effect of "Dinomorphia Diplos" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can send 1 "Dinomorphia" card from your Deck to the GY, then if your LP are 2000 or less, inflict 500 damage to your opponent. If this card is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can banish 1 Trap from your GY; Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "Dinomorphia" monster from your GY, except "Dinomorphia Diplos". You can only use each effect of "Dinomorphia Diplos" once per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
Activates if destroyed by card effect
